ClassificationLevel.description: U.S. Government classification markings permitted on an OPORD banner.
ClassificationLevel.title: ClassificationLevel

DataSourceMeta.description: Provenance header carried by every standalone data-source document.

title.description: Document title (e.g. 'JPITL for OP IRON STRIKE').
title.title: Title

classification.description: Classification level of this data source.

anyOf.description: Military date-time group in DDHHMMZMONYY form (e.g. '181200ZAPR26').

as_of_dtg.description: Date-time group the data was current as of.
as_of_dtg.title: As Of Dtg

DataSourceMeta.title: DataSourceMeta

TSTEntry.description:
One row on the Time-Sensitive Target list per JP 3-60 / ATP 3-60.

TSTs are targets of such importance that engagement authority is retained
at (or near) the component commander level and the F2T2EA loop operates
on a compressed timeline regardless of the normal targeting cycle.

priority_class.description: TST-1/2/3. TST-1 is the highest and typically retains component-level engagement authority.
priority_class.title: Priority Class

category.description: TST functional category driving matrix-based engagement authority.
category.title: Category

target_description.description: Narrative description of the target type and observable form.
target_description.title: Target Description

expected_activity.description: Behavior or indicator that triggers F2T2EA (e.g. 'TEL erects for launch').
expected_activity.title: Expected Activity

expected_locations.description: Likely NAIs, grids, or named areas where the target will appear.
expected_locations.title: Expected Locations

activity_window.description: DTG range when the target is expected (e.g. '190500ZAPR26 – 190800ZAPR26') or free-form.
activity_window.title: Activity Window

pid_standard.description: Positive-identification standard required before engagement (e.g. '2 independent sensors + visual').
pid_standard.title: Pid Standard

engagement_authority.description: Who authorizes the engagement (e.g. 'JFACC', 'JSOTF Cdr', 'BCT Cdr'). Usually component-level for TST-1.
engagement_authority.title: Engagement Authority

authorized_engagement_means.description: Delivery systems cleared for TST prosecution.
authorized_engagement_means.title: Authorized Engagement Means

cde_level.description: Pre-approved CDE ceiling; engagements beyond this ceiling require additional approval.
cde_level.title: Cde Level

collection_requirements.description: Collection assets cued on this TST (ISR platforms, SIGINT, HUMINT reports).
collection_requirements.title: Collection Requirements

notification_requirements.description: Entities to notify immediately on detection or prosecution (e.g. 'JFACC', 'adjacent JSOTF').
notification_requirements.title: Notification Requirements

expiration_criteria.description: Conditions under which this TST is removed from the list (e.g. 'neutralization confirmed via BDA' or DTG).
expiration_criteria.title: Expiration Criteria

linked_pir.description: PIR numbers whose answer depends on finding or engaging this TST.
linked_pir.title: Linked Pir

TSTEntry.title: TSTEntry

description: Standalone Time-Sensitive Target list per JP 3-60.

meta.description: Provenance metadata for this data source.

title: TSTDocument
